5. "Compaction loses context over time" This one cost me. Multiple times. Compaction is lossy compression.. it summarizes your conversation and drops details. Important things disappear. My fix: → MEMORY .md - curated long-term memory (loads every session) →

6. "Chat quality ≠ agent quality" After testing everything: Opus → best judgment, catches nuances others miss Sonnet → best value for volume work (sub-agents, research) GPT-5.2 → strong fallback, reliable tool calls GPT-5.3 Codex → all coding The model you chat with is
